name: scout-evidence-gap
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit | scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs},deterministic-output | lens: kahneman-tversky | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Bounded scope the claim depends on.

required_inputs.name: CLAIM_UNDER_CHECK
required_inputs.description: Claim, assumption, or conclusion that may lack enough evidence.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Time, scope, or cost limits for additional checking.
